title: Building and Sustaining Digital Trust: Responsibly Navigating Traceability and Provenance in the Gen AI Era
content:
## Building and Sustaining Digital Trust: Responsibly Navigating Traceability and Provenance in the Gen AI Era
Please join leaders from McCarthy Tétrault, EY and the Digital ID & Authentication Council of Canada for a discussion of how to apply human-centric and ethical approaches to issues of digital trust in an era of ground-breaking AI development and deployment.
We invite business leaders and public sector policymakers interested in provenance and traceability of information while maintaining privacy and security to attend: leaders who together will benefit from a better understanding of the complexities that help advance digital trust in today’s rapidly-evolving technology and data landscape.
The event will comprise a dynamic panel discussion where the spotlight will be on meaningful strategies to maintain and strengthen digital trust with efficiency and credibility. Following the panel discussion, guests will be able to continue to build trust on a human level through networking and socializing.
For questions about this event, please contact clientevents@mccarthy.ca .
This program qualifies for up to 1 hour of CPD credit under the Law Society of BC’s mandatory regime.
Time (PT): 4:00 p.m. - Registration 4:30 p.m. - Program begins 5:30 p.m. - Reception
- Law Society of British Columbia – Substantive
